human_acceptance_or_explicit_next_goal_b: CP00-909 is descriptor-only production-ready; HRX runtime opening, RecruitmentWorkflow runtime, candidate payloads, offer creation, risk workflow runtime, payroll runtime, HR AI final judgment, separate HRX product claims, enterprise trust, production deployment, and final human approval remain deferred to CP00-910/RP30.P02.M03.S10 or later human-approved packs.
